creator: torstenb@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Fix applied with modification. 
We don't use ${INSTALL_BIN} and 
${INSTALL_DATA} because they use ${BINOWN}/${BINGRP} and ${SHAREOWN}/ 
${SHAREGRP} which is (depening on platform and release) probably not what 
we want. From the security point-of-view, the postfix binaries and config 
files should belong to "root" and not "bin" or any other user.
